title: Nag Champa - Highly Scented 100% Soy Wax Snapbar
features: High Quality Paraben Free Fragrance Oil
description: Product description The classic fragrance of incense sticks but without the smoke! This sweet aromatic melt has powdery top notes followed by floral hints of frangipani, lily and orange flower on a woody base of sandalwood, patchouli, musk and vanilla. This scent creates a very calming and warming environment, great for meditation and yoga. To use, simply break off required amount of wax (1 segment is usually sufficient for an average sized room) and place in a suitable wax melter or burner. Can be used in either tealight or electric heated burners. After use allow to cool, dispose of residual wax and wipe clean. All our snapbars are highly scented and will provide many hours of fabulous fragrance for your home. PLEASE NOTE - Pictured in multiples, SOLD AS INDIVIDUAL SNAPBARS. You will receive one for the price shown. Legal Disclaimer Disclaimer ** Devon Melts are in no way affiliated with branded companies. Our makes that are similar in identity to leading branded companies are all Types. None of our products contain; soaps, sweets, foodstuffs, perfumes or cleaning agents.
